name: universally
description: A WordPress plugin with WP Panel admin interface.
author: Universally

scripts.makepot: docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/plugin --user $(id -u):$(id -g) wordpress:cli wp i18n make-pot /plugin /plugin/languages/universally-language-translation-multilingual-tool.pot --domain=universally-language-translation-multilingual-tool --slug=universally-language-translation-multilingual-tool --exclude=node_modules,vendor,panel/build,dist,build
